title: Zapier GET Metric Relationships Endpoint for MCP Integration
description:
Create a Zapier-compatible GET endpoint to retrieve all relationships for a single metric, enabling AI agents to answer questions about metric context.

### Endpoint
`GET /api/v1_0/zapier/metric/relationship/{dt_metric_id}`

### Response Includes
- **metric**: name, description, calculation
- **aliases**: list of alias names
- **reports**: related Salesforce report names
- **dashboards**: related Salesforce dashboard names
- **tableau_dashboards**: related Tableau dashboard names
- **Taxonomy**: grouped by taxonomy type (e.g., Line of Business, Topic)
- **linked_metrics**: metrics this metric influences (with relationship label and ID)
- **linked_by_metrics**: metrics that influence this metric
- **logic**: logic definitions grouped by system (Salesforce, Snowflake, Tableau, HubSpot)
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint returns complete metric metadata and all relationships
Response includes aliases, reports, dashboards, Tableau dashboards, taxonomy, linked metrics, and logic
Logic definitions are grouped by source system
Endpoint is accessible via Bearer token
Endpoint is registered as a Zapier tool
middleware_changes: Aggregation of all metric relationships into a single API response: aliases, reports, dashboards, Tableau dashboards, taxonomy values, linked metrics (bidirectional), and logic definitions by system.
api_changes: New GET endpoint `/api/v1_0/zapier/metric/relationship/{dt_metric_id}` returning comprehensive metric relationship data. Added to Zapier integration.
implementation_notes: This is a read-heavy endpoint that joins across multiple tables: metrics, aliases, report associations, dashboard associations, Tableau dashboard associations, taxonomy values, metric-to-metric links, and logic definitions. Bearer token authentication scopes to the team.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the endpoint and documented the full response schema with examples. Added the endpoint to the Zapier integration as a tool.
